On-call bag check — restock gloves, doppler, and the birth kit before you head out.
Market morning: alarm's set for 6, load the tea and Square reader tonight.
Leave-by reminder: out the door by 8:30 for clinic, Neil has Owen drop-off.
CEU deadline nudge — 12 hours left to log, December is closer than you think.
Hazel pickup at 3:15 today, you're off the board.
Sunday meal-prep reminder: check the fridge at 4, plan the week's dinners.
Budget day — confirm the $600 savings transfer posted at Pinnacle.
Yoga at 7 if you're up, nothing scheduled before 8 on your day off.
Retreat reminder: Pisgah cabin Oct 17, pack layers and the on-call phone.
Owen's birthday party Saturday — bouncy castle vendor arrives at 10.
